title: ToolTreaux Platinum Metal Acid Testing Kit with Testing Stone, 7pc
description:
Safely test for platinum purity with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Purity Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the platinum purity testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin collectors, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with precious metals

ToolTreaux Platinum Metal Acid Testing Kit with Testing Stone, 7pc

Safely test for platinum purity with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Purity Testing Safety Kit! The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the platinum purity testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin collectors, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with precious metals.

Key Features

  • PLATINUM TESTING KIT: Safely test platinum purity and quality; kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the platinum testing solution is effective and will see you through hundreds of tests
  • PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is ideally used on platinum material that has yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished platinum items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish
  • HOW THE PLATINUM TESTING KIT WORKS: To test for platinum purity, scratch the item on to the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the deposit is in fact of pure platinum content, the deposit and solution will remain unaffected
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Testing Stone Dimensions: 2 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Stone Weight: 0.01lbs; Bottle Dimensions: 3 x 1 x 1 inches; Bottle Weight: 0.04lbs; Bottle Material: Plastic; Solution Capacity: 0.5 ounces; Solution made in USA
  • NOTE: Keep out of reach of children; Use caution when opening and using; Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended; Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 8HD63VS01
  • UPC: 810058482365
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Medium

PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is ideally used on material that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished platinum items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item

TESTING FOR PLATINUM: To test for platinum purity , scratch the item onto the thoroughly washed test stone, leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the material is of of pure platinum content, the solution will not change and the deposit will remain unaffected

SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.
